title: News: 2025 Q1
description: 15 questions about major events from January to March 2025

questions.question: Who was inaugurated as the 47th President of the United States on January 20, 2025?
questions.explanation: Donald Trump was inaugurated as the 47th President on January 20, 2025, returning to office for a second non-consecutive term.

questions.question: Which Chinese AI startup released a low-cost reasoning model in January 2025 that rivaled top Western AI systems?
questions.explanation: Chinese AI startup DeepSeek released its R1 reasoning model in January 2025, which rivaled top Western AI models at a fraction of the cost.

questions.question: What major executive order did Trump sign on his first day back in office regarding immigration?
options: Built a wall along the Canadian border
Declared a national emergency at the southern border
Granted amnesty to all undocumented immigrants
questions.explanation: Trump declared a national emergency at the southern border on his first day, deploying military resources and resuming border wall construction.

questions.question: Which international agreement did the United States withdraw from again under President Trump in January 2025?
questions.explanation: Trump signed an executive order to withdraw the US from the Paris Climate Agreement for the second time.

questions.question: Which social media platform was briefly banned in the United States in January 2025 before being restored?
questions.explanation: TikTok was briefly banned in the US on January 19, 2025, before Trump signed an executive order to delay enforcement of the ban.

questions.question: Which devastating natural disaster struck the Los Angeles area in January 2025?
questions.explanation: Massive wildfires swept through the Los Angeles area in January 2025, destroying thousands of structures in Pacific Palisades, Altadena, and other communities.

questions.question: Who did Trump nominate as the US Secretary of Defense in early 2025?
questions.explanation: Trump nominated Pete Hegseth, a Fox News host and military veteran, as Secretary of Defense.

questions.question: Which organization did the United States announce its withdrawal from in early 2025?
questions.explanation: Trump signed an executive order to withdraw the United States from the World Health Organization (WHO).

questions.question: What was the name of the AI model released by OpenAI in early 2025 with advanced reasoning capabilities?
questions.explanation: OpenAI released the o3 reasoning model in early 2025, building on their chain-of-thought reasoning approach.

questions.question: Which country's stock market saw significant turbulence after DeepSeek's AI breakthrough rattled tech stocks worldwide?
questions.explanation: US tech stocks, particularly NVIDIA, saw major drops after DeepSeek demonstrated competitive AI capabilities at much lower costs.

questions.question: Who was confirmed as US Secretary of State in January 2025?
questions.explanation: Marco Rubio was confirmed as Secretary of State, becoming the first Hispanic person to hold the position.

questions.question: What executive action did Trump take regarding federal diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) programs?
options: Ordered their elimination across federal agencies
questions.explanation: Trump signed executive orders to dismantle DEI programs across federal agencies and placed DEI staff on administrative leave.

questions.question: Which European country held a federal election in February 2025?
questions.explanation: Germany held federal elections on February 23, 2025, following the collapse of the coalition government led by Olaf Scholz.

questions.question: Who won the 2025 German federal election?
questions.explanation: Friedrich Merz and the CDU/CSU won the German federal election in February 2025.

questions.question: What major policy did Trump announce regarding tariffs in early 2025?
options: Eliminated all tariffs on European goods
Imposed new tariffs on imports from Canada, Mexico, and China
Joined a global free trade agreement
Reduced tariffs on all imports by 50%
questions.explanation: Trump imposed significant new tariffs on imports from Canada, Mexico, and China in early 2025, escalating trade tensions.
